title: Isle of Dawn
author: The First Realm
description: The starting realm of Skybound Memories. Here, new players wake up in a vast desert, learn the basic mechanisms of flight, light candles, and climb to the temple above the clouds.
extra_info: Contains 3 standard spirits, 1 winged light checkpoint, and the famous Rainbow Bridge OOB.

title: Daylight Prairie
author: The Second Realm
description: A sunny, lush meadow filled with floating islands, cave systems, and friendly creatures. It is a central hub for social interactions and candle runs.
extra_info: Contains 8 standard spirits, a 2-player puzzle door, and the 8-player butterfly altar elevator.

title: Hidden Forest
author: The Third Realm
description: A dark, rainy woodland where rain drains your cape's energy. Players must seek shelter under glowing mushrooms, trees, and shrines to keep their light burning.
extra_info: Contains 8 standard spirits, the Sunny Forest hidden area, and multiple underground caves.

title: Valley of Triumph
author: The Fourth Realm
description: A snowy mountain range focused on speed, racing, and celebration. Features ice rinks, two race courses (Sliding and Flying), and a grand coliseum arena.
extra_info: Contains 7 standard spirits, the Village of Dreams, and the Hermit Valley peak.

title: Golden Wasteland
author: The Fifth Realm
description: A dangerous desolation featuring toxic dark water, krill (Dark Dragons) that attack on sight, and giant crabs. Courage and stealth are required to survive here.
extra_info: Contains 6 standard spirits, the Forgotten Ark boat area, and the Wind Paths portal.

title: Vault of Knowledge
author: The Sixth Realm
description: An archive library tower where players levitate from floor to floor using platforms. Uncovers the history, lore, and stars of the ancient fallen kingdom.
extra_info: Contains 5 standard spirits, the Starlight Desert (Little Prince), and the Office secret area.

title: Butterfly Charmer
author: Daylight Prairie
description: A friendly spirit who teaches the gesture of holding out a hand to attract butterflies. Located in the circular stone ruins of Daylight Prairie's first zone.
extra_info: Offers the Butterfly pose emote, a hair style resembling double buns, and the yellow butterfly cape.

title: Pointing Candlemaker
author: Isle of Dawn
description: Located inside a small stone cave along the left side of the sand dunes in the Isle of Dawn. Teaches players how to point at directions.
extra_info: Unlocks the pointing emote, a simple short hairstyle, and standard white candles.

title: Rejecting Voyager
author: Isle of Dawn
description: This spirit is situated behind a tall sand dune to the left of the Isle's main path. Teaches the cross-armed gesture indicating refusal or rejection.
extra_info: Unlocks the Refuse/No gesture, a long ponytail hairstyle, and the basic beige cape.

title: Apologetic Lumberjack
author: Hidden Forest
description: Located inside a hollow tree trunk in the second clearing of the Hidden Forest. Teaches players the formal apologetic bow.
extra_info: Unlocks the Apologize emote, a spiky woodcutter hairstyle, and the dark blue forest cape.

title: Shivering Trailblazer
author: Hidden Forest
description: Found sheltering under a small stone dome in the first rainy area of the Hidden Forest. She is shivering from the cold rain.
extra_info: Unlocks the Shivering emote, a earmuff-style winter hairstyle, and the light green teal cape.

title: Backflipping Champion
author: Valley of Triumph
description: Located on one of the stone arches overlooking the Frozen Rink in the Valley of Triumph. Requires basic flying control to trace.
extra_info: Unlocks the Backflip expression, a spiky athletic hairstyle, and the crimson red cape.

title: Praying Acolyte
author: Vault of Knowledge
description: Hidden behind a four-player door on the ground floor of the Vault of Knowledge. Players must work together to open the heavy stone gate.
extra_info: Unlocks the Pray gesture, a shaved hairstyle with top knot, and the dark purple cape.

title: Rainbow Bridge
author: Isle of Dawn
description: A legendary, invisible rainbow bridge located extremely high in the sky above the Isle of Dawn temple. Originally a developers' guide marker, it was left behind in the game.
extra_info: Can be reached by flying high to the right of the temple exit clouds. Recommended to go with friends to recharge light.

title: The Elder Room
author: Valley of Triumph
description: A hidden void chamber located directly above the Coliseum's temple roof. Offers breathtaking twilight colors and unique light reflections ideal for taking photos.
extra_info: Accessed by clipping through the window frames of the Coliseum temple wall using piggyback or fly-charge tricks.

title: Days of Bloom
author: Spring Event
description: An annual spring event celebrating renewal, growth, and nature. Features beautiful cherry blossom trees that sprout in Daylight Prairie and drop light petals.
extra_info: Features special in-game cosmetic items like blossom capes, hair flowers, and pink tea tables.
